task: Add a Box Combo to my bag with Diet Coke as the drink, and a Kids Combo with milk as the drink. Select the store closest to ZIP 10001 for pickup tomorrow at 12:00 PM.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the requested setup. Evidence shows it searched ZIP 10001 and selected the closest store, Raising Cane’s #987 at 1 Penn Plaza, New York, NY 10119, listed as 0.2 miles away. It set pickup for tomorrow at 12:00 PM, confirmed on the menu/order pages as “Pickup at 1 Penn Plaza Ready by Tomorrow at 12:00 PM.” It added The Box Combo with Diet Coke (bag shows “Regular Diet Coke”) and The Kids Combo with milk (bag shows “Kids Meal Milk”). Final My Order page displays both items and the pickup details, stopping before checkout.
final_result_response:
Done. Your bag has:

- The Box Combo with Regular Diet Coke
- The Kids Combo with Milk

Pickup is set for Raising Cane’s #987, 1 Penn Plaza, New York, NY 10119, tomorrow at 12:00 PM.

I stopped at the checkout stage.
action_history: Opening Raising Cane's site: const p1 = await openTab('https://raisingcanes.com/');
Starting order flow: await page.locator('e88').click();
Starting order flow: await page.locator('e9').click();
Searching by ZIP code: await page.locator('e6').fill('10001');
Searching by ZIP code: await page.locator('e7').click();
Selecting ZIP suggestion: await page.locator('e21').click();
Selecting ZIP suggestion: await page.locator('e7').click();
Choosing closest store: await page.locator('e33').click();
Confirming individual order: await page.locator('e89').click();
Selecting later pickup: await page.locator('e93').click();
Starting scheduled order: await page.locator('e95').click();
Opening combo menu: await page.locator('e117').click();
Opening Box Combo customization: await page.locator('e140').click();
Selecting Diet Coke for Box Combo: await page.locator('e181').click();
Trying Diet Coke selection again: await page.locator('e181').click({force:true});
Selecting regular Diet Coke: await page.locator('e214').click();
Adding Diet Coke customization: await page.locator('e218').click();
Adding Box Combo to order: await page.locator('e200').click();
Opening combos for Kids Combo: await page.locator('e230').click();
Opening Kids Combo customization: await page.locator('e256').click();
Adding Kids Combo to order: await page.locator('e308').click();
Opening bag for verification: await page.locator('e98').click();
